name: pi-tau-web-server
description: Standalone web server for managing multiple Pi RPC sessions in the browser
author: deflating

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && tsc -p tsconfig.public.json && node scripts/copy-katex.mjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.public.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json
